title: Report on MAP process failures during self-update
description: Operator requested a full report on MAP processes and how they were used during the recent MAP self-update/gap-fill sequence, with emphasis on what went wrong, what is missing, and process weaknesses more than what worked.
acceptance_criteria: Report focuses on failures, gaps, missing process support, and concrete examples from TASK-103 through TASK-121
Report distinguishes fixed issues from remaining risks/gaps
Report incorporates or explicitly accounts for active agent input where available
Report is durable, reviewable, and validated with task graph/events checks
